series_metadata.series_description: This form is compelted by all employees subject to withholding of Ohio Income Tax. This enables the employer to withhold according to the number of dependents claimed by the employee. The employee will complete a new IT-4 each time he/she wishes to change the number of dependents claimed.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until employee terminates employment or exemptions are changed. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain until employee terminates employment or exemptions are changed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
